understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver selectable pieces and pushable blocks, using movement and selection actions, to place an object onto the goal tile(s) as identified in the semantic grid by '+', thereby achieving the WIN condition stated by the engine.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_UP, MOVE_DOWN, MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT) shifted the currently selected piece by one grid cell unless blocked by a wall or obstacle. Pushable blocks could be pushed if adjacent in the movement direction. Walls prevented movement as indicated by movement.blocked hints, but not all boundaries behaved identically. CLICK actions allowed switching between selectable pieces by specifying the exact position from the objects list.
